ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023 Regular Season) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team based on their performance metrics */,
  "pct_of_pts_from_three_ptrs" REAL /* Percentage of points scored from three-point shots */,
  "pct_of_pts_from_three_ptrs_h" REAL /* Percentage of points scored from three-point shots at home */,
  "pct_of_pts_from_three_ptrs_a" REAL /* Percentage of points scored from three-point shots away */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the given period */,
  "three_point_shots_made" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots made by the team */,
  "three_point_shots_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots attempted by the team */,
  "three_point_shooting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of three-point shots made out of total three-point shots attempted */,
  "two_point_shots_made" INTEGER /* Total two-point shots made by the team */,
  "two_point_shots_attempted" INTEGER /* Total two-point shots attempted by the team */,
  "two_point_shooting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of two-point shots made out of total two-point shots attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the team */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of free throws made out of total free throws attempted */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team in the given period */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of games won out of total games played */,
  "yr_start" INTEGER /* Starting year of the performance data */,
  "yr_end" INTEGER /* Ending year of the performance data */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "filter_date" TEXT /* Date for filtering the performance data */,
  "retrieve_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
